ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size chart is for */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type the size chart is for */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the size chart is a custom chart */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the size chart is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the size chart */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region (e.g., EU, US, UK) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., Tops, Pants) */,
  "product_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product type */,
  "is_fabric_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product type is sensitive to fabric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart detail */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the detail belongs to */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size number (e.g., 32, 34) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "empire" REAL /* Empire measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "arm_length" REAL /* Arm length measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise measurement in cm */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart detail being checked */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the quality control check */,
  "measurement_tolerances" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific tolerances for each measurement */,
  "rechecked_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rechecked the measurements */,
  "recheck_date" TEXT /* Date when the recheck was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_rechecked_by FOREIGN KEY ("rechecked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_detail_id FOREIGN KEY ("detail_id") REFERENCES size_chart_details ("detail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_details" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier who produced the batch */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart used for the batch */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for identification */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in the batch */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the batch */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the batch */,
  "quality_issues" TEXT /* JSON object containing any quality issues found in the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_details_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_details_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production manager, quality control) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., size chart, batch detail) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource being accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
